rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAGILAVY FAMILY TRUST ESTABLISHED JUNE 5, 1989 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT On Maureen Magilavys Petition To Appoint An Independent Successor Trustee; To Compel Accounting; And For Surcharge
rulings.Rulings: In light of the Court having been recently informed that the moving party has passed away, this matter will be taken off calendar.
